title: Sweet & Light Russian Beef Kidney Pilaf
description: A delightful date-night dish featuring sweet and tender beef kidneys in a light, aromatic pilaf sauce, made with plant-based-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add soy mince and cook until browned.
Add minced garlic and chopped onion to the pan, sautéing for about 2 minutes or until fragrant.
Chop red bell pepper into strips. Add it to the pan with the cooked mince mixture.
Stir in some diced tomatoes and a splash of balsamic vinegar.
In another pot, bring vegetable broth to a simmer and season with salt and pepper.
Pour the broth over the ingredients in the pan, cover, and let it cook for about 10 minutes or until the vegetables are tender. Stir occasionally.
Stir in nutritional yeast, lemon juice, and vegan butter (optional) until well combined.
